name: Bridge Learning & Performance API
what_it_does: Bridge (Volaris Group) learning and performance management REST API for employee development, skill-based learning, performance reviews, and engagement surveys. Enables AI agents to manage course enrollment and learning path assignment for automated employee development workflow, handle skills tracking and competency management for talent development automation, access performance review and 1:1 meeting management for continuous performance automation, retrieve learning analytics and skills gap analysis for workforce development intelligence, manage career development and mentoring programs for talent retention automation, handle compliance training and certification tracking for regulatory learning management, access engagement surveys and employee feedback for organizational health automation, retrieve manager-team visibility for learning and performance for leadership development, manage content library and SCORM deployment for e-learning distribution, and integrate Bridge with HRIS (BambooHR, Workday, ADP) and SSO providers for unified people development.
use_cases: Developing employee skills from L&D automation agents
Tracking learning compliance from regulatory agents
Conducting performance reviews from HR automation agents
Measuring employee engagement from culture agents
not_for: Customer and partner training (use Northpass or Skilljar)
Frontline/deskless workforce training (use Schoox or Axonify)
best_when: A mid-market organization wanting AI agents to automate employee learning, skill development, performance reviews, and engagement surveys within a unified platform that combines LMS and light performance management in Bridge.
avoid_when: VOLARIS/INSTRUCTURE PRODUCT OWNERSHIP UNCERTAINTY: Bridge was originally part of Instructure (Canvas LMS); Instructure sold Bridge to Volaris Group (Constellation Software) in 2019; verify current product investment and API roadmap under Volaris ownership before deep integration; product maintenance priority may differ from core Instructure investment. GDPR EU EMPLOYEE LEARNING AND PERFORMANCE DATA: Automated Bridge processing of EU employee learning records, performance reviews, and engagement survey responses constitutes employment data under GDPR; automated retention beyond statutory employment data period creates GDPR violation. PERFORMANCE REVIEW AUTOMATED DECISIONS: Automated performance scores from Bridge used in compensation or termination decisions must be audited for disparate impact; automated people decisions without bias review create EEOC disparate impact liability. ENGAGEMENT SURVEY ANONYMITY: Automated Bridge engagement survey reporting must enforce minimum response threshold before displaying group results; automated sub-threshold group reporting identifies individual respondents and creates retaliation risk.

auth.notes: Bridge uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Salt Lake City, Utah HQ (Volaris Group, Constellation Software subsidiary). Bridge originally created by Instructure (Canvas LMS company); Instructure sold Bridge to Volaris Group in 2019 to focus on Canvas education market. Volaris Group is a Toronto-based software acquisitions company (TSX: CSU). Bridge serves mid-market corporate learning and performance. Competes with Absorb, TalentLMS, and Cornerstone for corporate LMS with performance features.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription with module-based pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; Learn (LMS), Perform (performance), and Retain (engagement) modules; bundled pricing
pricing.notes: Salt Lake City UT. Volaris Group / Constellation Software TSX:CSU subsidiary. Instructure divested 2019. Mid-market corporate learning and performance. Per-user annual subscription by module.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; learning and performance API throttled per tier

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — LEARNING AND PERFORMANCE EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Bridge does not support native webhooks for course completion, performance review submission, or engagement survey events; automated L&D and performance workflow requires scheduled polling

VOLARIS ACQUISITION PRODUCT INVESTMENT UNCERTAINTY: Bridge is owned by Volaris Group (Constellation Software), which typically acquires and maintains software products with lean investment; verify current API development pace and feature roadmap; Volaris may prioritize maintenance over new API capabilities compared to VC-backed LMS competitors

PERFORMANCE REVIEW AUTOMATED EMPLOYMENT DECISIONS: Automated performance score aggregation from Bridge Perform used in compensation or termination recommendations must be validated for disparate impact; automated employment decisions without bias audit create EEOC Title VII disparate impact liability

ENGAGEMENT SURVEY ANONYMITY THRESHOLD: Automated Bridge engagement survey result reporting must enforce minimum response threshold (typically 5+) before displaying group results; sub-threshold group reporting reveals individual responses and creates workplace retaliation risk

Learning path vs standalone course completion for compliance — automated compliance reporting must distinguish between Bridge learning path completion (all courses complete) and standalone course completion; automated compliance certificate issuance on partial learning path completion creates regulatory audit finding

HRIS user sync and terminated employee deprovisioning — automated HRIS-to-Bridge user sync must immediately deactivate terminated employee accounts; batch sync delay creates performance review and sensitive survey access window for departed employees
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate LMS and performance. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Employee learning and performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate LMS and performance. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Employee learning and performance review data.
